attributes.description: Alerts when DML lock utilisation exceeds 85% (`dml_locks.usage / dml_locks.limit`). Precedes transaction queueing and lock errors.
attributes.name: [Oracle OTel] DML lock utilisation high

investigation_guide.blob:
## Oracle DML lock utilisation high

### What fired
DML lock utilisation exceeded 85% during the window.

### Why it matters
DML locks are exhausted by concurrent DDL-like operations. Nearing the limit causes session queueing and ORA-00055 errors.

### Triage
1. Inspect the workload for unusual DDL patterns.

### Remediation
- Raise `dml_locks` init parameter.

### Tuning
- 85% threshold; tighten for critical OLTP.
